name: Chicken Paella#1
recipeIngredient: 1 small green pepper, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sliced sausage in a Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Cut the chicken into serving pieces and brown it in the sausage drippings; season with salt and pepper. Remove the chicken to a plate.
3. Add the onion, green pepper, and garlic to the pan. Cook until the onion is tender.
4. Stir in the uncooked rice, bouillon granules, turmeric, and water. Bring to boiling.
5. Return the chicken to the pan and add the carrots.
6. Cover and bake at 375°F for 40 minutes or until the chicken and rice are tender.
7. To serve, gently toss the mixture together.
